title: Tymtogo
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
'''''Tymtogo''''' was a [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|Lambda-class T-4a shuttle]] belonging to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial Navy]]. It was part of [[Deep Space Manufacturing Facility]] [[Drekker]]'s procedure that, should the station's hull integrity go to at least 25%, the shuttle would launch, carrying officers. The shuttle in this case would make a run for the [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Inexorable (Victory-class)|''Inexorable'']].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter]]''
